stemHtml: You are flying above Bristol and need to dump the fuel. What do you need to do?

options.a: Climb to 4000 ft and dump fuel.
options.b: Climb to 5000 ft and fly over Bristol channel, then dump the fuel.
options.c: Climb to 6000 ft and fly over Bristol channel, then dump the fuel.
options.d: Climb to 3000 ft and dump fuel.
